description: Use this API to read transaction event data from a transactions raw data file and add it to PSSE working memory. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = remm(opt, ifile)

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Flag for new or change data records. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Name of transactions raw data file. (input; no default allowed).

opt.description: new data; replaces existing transactions data.
change data; modifies existing transactions data.

error_codes.description: no transactions defined; change mode invalid.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
